title: What Lies Beneath the Surface of Ice?

scenes.text: Hidden beneath the ice, entire ecosystems thrive!
Microbial life survives in extreme conditions, feeding on the nutrients in the ice.
Some species can even survive for thousands of years frozen in ice.
These ecosystems hold secrets to Earth's climate history!
scenes.label: CLIMATE HISTORIANS

scenes.text: Follow so you never run out of fun facts.

description: Beneath icy surfaces, hidden ecosystems thrive, providing insights into our planet's history! Follow for daily facts!
